options.content:
Gluon Census Exporter

This dashboard reflects the globally used version distribution of the Gluon mesh framework.
The exporter and the scraped communites are availalbe at https://github.com/freifunk-gluon/census-exporter.
The config of this Server is availalbe at https://github.com/gluon-census/nixos-config.

Alien nodes:

Nodes running a non-Gluon OS. Such nodes are not included in any other sections/rows above.

spec.legendFormat: Sum of others, w. domain size < 5
